claim_boundary: The system is presented as a bounded workstation/review scaffold with demonstrated internal artifacts. Commercial viability, valuation, legal defensibility, tax treatment, contract posture, and accounting treatment require professional review.

phases.goal: Create a forensic index of key workplans, reports, artifacts, commits, hashes, and boundaries.
Create a conservative matrix of what is viable, what is scaffolded, what is unvalidated, and what requires professional review.
Prepare CPA/lawyer trigger thresholds, paid-pilot handling, no-free-pilot posture, and professional questions.
Create a counsel/CPA review packet index without disclosing protected implementation by default.
Audit the professional readiness package for claim safety, continuity, and clean boundaries.

professional_review_boundary: This package is preparation for lawyer/CPA review only. It is not legal advice, financial advice, tax advice, valuation advice, compliance certification, or a substitute for retained professionals.
purpose: Prepare a lawyer/CPA-readable forensic accounting package for the SpecShift workstation system, including artifact inventory, provenance, viability status, claim boundaries, business-readiness thresholds, and professional-review questions.
